title: 50% v/v Sterile Glycerol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bda5i","text":"The optimal concentration of long-term glycerol storage is unknown. Most labs store bacteria in 15-25% glycerol. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Collect a 0.250 L bottle with top.
Pour 1 part (50 mL) of glycerol with 1 part (50 mL) of deionized H2O
Place autoclave tape on the lid of the bottle and autoclave at 121°C for 20-30 minutes Make sure the lid is loosened to avoid pressure build up.
creator: Tamra Mbeuh Lahom Lot
